# @cascivo/docs

> Documentation site for cascivo — generated from component manifests

[cascivo.com](https://cascivo.com) · [Docs](https://docs.cascivo.com) · [Storybook](https://storybook.cascivo.com) · [GitHub](https://github.com/cascivo/cascivo)

Auto-generated documentation site for cascade — component API references, live interactive examples, accessibility tables, and theming guides. Built with Vite + Preact and deployed to `docs.cascivo.com`.
